title: シンザン記念にむけて

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yahoo! It's finally time for the Shinzan Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, I heard there'll be a slew of speedy runners
since it's a graded race, so winnin' probably won't
be so easy.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All that said... I ain't gonna lose!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep dashin' all the way to becoming
Umamusume of the Year!
choice_data_list: If anyone can do it, you can!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You know it! I'm right there with ya on that
one. ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Just watch me! I'll blow everybody away with my
hurricane speed!
